evals.prompt: I just wrote this marketing-ish overview about digital transformation for our internal wiki. Can you clean it up? It reads too much like ChatGPT wrote it. The file is at evals/files/en_ai_text.md
evals.expected_output: The text should have AI vocabulary removed (crucial, pivotal, seamlessly, groundbreaking, etc.), copula avoidance fixed (serves as → is), listicle bold-header format converted to prose, negative parallelisms simplified, rule-of-three filler trimmed, and superficial analysis clause endings deleted. Meaning and content must be preserved.
expectations: Words like 'crucial', 'pivotal', 'seamlessly', 'groundbreaking' are removed or replaced
The phrase 'serves as' is replaced with 'is' or equivalent
The bold-label list format is converted to prose or plain list
The 'not only X but also Y' pattern is simplified
'Additionally,' sentence opener is removed or replaced
The rule-of-three 'fast, reliable, and scalable' is trimmed
Vague 'Experts argue' without citation is flagged or removed
The original meaning and factual claims are preserved

evals.prompt: Ich habe diesen Text über digitale Transformation geschrieben, aber er klingt irgendwie nach KI. Kannst du die KI-Muster entfernen? Die Datei ist evals/files/de_ai_text.md
evals.expected_output: German AI patterns removed: entscheidend, ermöglicht, unterstreicht, nahtlos, wegweisend, wertvolle Erkenntnisse. Copula fix: dient als → ist. Schlüssel-parallel structure broken up. Bold-header list → prose. Swiss 'ss' convention maintained. Meaning preserved.
expectations: Words like 'entscheidend', 'wegweisend', 'nahtlos', 'umfassend' are removed or replaced
The phrase 'dient als' is replaced with 'ist' or equivalent
The bold-label list format is converted to prose or plain list
'Darüber hinaus' sentence opener is removed or replaced
The 'Schlüssel zu X / Schlüssel zu Z' parallel structure is restructured
'Experten sind sich einig' without citation is flagged or removed
Swiss convention: no 'ß' appears in the output (all 'ss')
The original meaning and factual claims are preserved

evals.prompt: j'ai rédigé ce texte sur la transformation numérique mais ça sonne trop IA/ChatGPT. tu peux nettoyer les patterns artificiels? le fichier est dans evals/files/fr_ai_text.md
evals.expected_output: French AI patterns removed: crucial, fait office de, souligne, met en évidence, de manière transparente, précieuses perspectives. Copula fix: fait office de → est. Bold-header list → prose. Negative parallelism simplified. Meaning preserved.
expectations: Words like 'crucial', 'révolutionnaire', 'exhaustive' are removed or replaced
The phrase 'fait office de' is replaced with 'est' or equivalent
The bold-label list format is converted to prose or plain list
'De plus' or 'En outre' sentence opener is removed or replaced
'Les experts s'accordent à dire' without citation is flagged or removed
The trailing clause 'ce qui met en évidence...' is removed
'il convient de noter' is removed or simplified
The original meaning and factual claims are preserved

evals.prompt: ho scritto questo testo sulla trasformazione digitale ma è troppo 'AI-generated'. puoi togliere i pattern artificiali? il file è in evals/files/it_ai_text.md
evals.expected_output: Italian AI patterns removed: cruciale, funge da, sottolinea, mette in evidenza, in modo trasparente, preziose intuizioni. Copula fix: funge da → è. Bold-header list → prose. Negative parallelism simplified. Meaning preserved.
expectations: Words like 'cruciale', 'rivoluzionaria', 'esaustivo' are removed or replaced
The phrase 'funge da' is replaced with 'è' or equivalent
The bold-label list format is converted to prose or plain list
'Inoltre' sentence opener is removed or replaced
'Gli esperti concordano' without citation is flagged or removed
The trailing clause 'il che mette in evidenza...' is removed
'è importante sottolineare' is removed or simplified
The original meaning and factual claims are preserved
